from source import max_sublist_sum

def test_max_sublist_sum_with_negative_values():
    arr = [4, -5, 2, 1, -1, 3]
    expected_max_sum = 5
    assert max_sublist_sum(arr) == expected_max_sum, f"Expected max_sublist_sum({arr}) to return {expected_max_sum}, but got {max_sublist_sum(arr)}"
